title: Fixing digital democracy: from fragmented tools to a vibrant European Civic Tech Hub [Promoted Content]
summary_full: Europe does not lack civic tech innovation; it lacks connection. A European Civic Tech Hub has the potential to become a shared infrastructure for digital democracy: helping civic tech organisations, public administrations and service providers work towards interoperability, build trust through common standards, and create sustainable participation processes across borders.
